---
title: "Visualizing in R"
author: "Filip Kukic"
format: html
editor: source
---

# Visualization

This section collects my notes and exercises on data visualization in R.

## Chapters

- [Exploratory Data Analysis](Visualize/exploratory-data-analysis.qmd)
- [Facets](Visualize/facets.qmd)
- [Statistical Transformation](Visualize/statistical-transformation.qmd)
- [Position Adjustment](Visualize/position-adjustment.qmd)
- [The Layered Grammar of Graphics](Visualize/the-layered-grammar-of-graphics.qmd)
